title: hyptis graveolens
intro: Hyptis graveolens, also known as Mexican tea or false pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to Central America and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Hyptis graveolens include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Hyptis graveolens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and provide natural relief from various health concerns.
